title: Intensely Crunchy Uruguayan Myeolchi Anchovies Bake
description: A rich and crunchy Uruguayan dish featuring myeolchi anchovies, perfect for a hangover cure, made in a raclette grill and low in glycemic index.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the crushed myeolchi anchovies, almond flour, parmesan cheese, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs and set aside.
Add the olive oil to the raclette grill and swirl it around to coat the surface.
Pour the egg mixture into the grill and scramble the eggs until they are almost set.
Add the myeolchi anchovy mixture on top of the eggs and stir until well combined.
Close the grill and cook for 10 minutes or until the top is golden brown and crunchy.
Remove from the grill and serve hot.
